title: Identify The Mistakes (Q4.2)
master_statement: Gas is transported in a horizontal pipeline that has a change in cross-sectional area as depicted. One of the engineers working on the project drew up the following diagram for right to left flow within the pipeline. What, if anything, is wrong with it?

choices: The eddies are in the wrong direction
Streamlines cannot come from a wall
Streamlines cannot be drawn along walls
